texto: I had brought from Paris the national prejudice against Italian music
autor: but I had also received from nature that acute sensibility against which prejudices are powerless. I soon contracted the passion it inspires in all those born to understand it.
explicacao: Citação de but I had also received from nature that acute sensibility against which prejudices are powerless. I soon contracted the passion it inspires in all those born to understand it. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I had brought from Paris the national prejudice against Italian music” articula reflexao, jean-jacques-rousseau, confessions em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como confessions.
